name: Argentine Peso token
reason:
ARGt is the largest Argentine peso stablecoin by circulating supply, with 12.7B ARGt in circulation (approx. 8.1M USD), fully backed by Argentine treasury instruments. It is issued by Twin Finance, a LATAM blockchain infrastructure company that also issues fully-backed local-currency stablecoins for Brazil, Colombia, Peru, Mexico, Chile, and Bolivia. The token is already listed on Belo, one of the main wallets in LATAM with over 3M users.

**Why add it:**
ARGt is being integrated by other providers (on/off-ramps, exchanges, wallets), which route swaps through LiFi, which in turn uses CoW Protocol as one of its solvers. Listing ARGt on CoW is a hard dependency for this integration to work.

**Liquidity:**
Market makers are ready to provide liquidity programmatically via CoW Protocol limit orders from day one. A Uniswap V3 pool also exists on Arbitrum One and can be seeded if required by the review process.

**Project links:**
Website: https://twin.finance/
X: https://x.com/twinfinance_
